testcase.name: realtime WS endpoint is reachable (400 upgrade-required, not 5xx)
plan upgrade accepted or cleanly unsupported (not 5xx)
signup succeeds OR fails only on email DELIVERY (Mailpit env gap) OR is a clean validation/disabled response
token grant succeeds OR is a clean auth rejection (user unconfirmed: mail not delivered on this run)
no-session get user is a clean 401 (autoconfirm OFF)

testsuite.name: 30 Data CRUD / Create scratch table — POST /query/v1/{dbId}/schema/ddl

testcase.name: create_table applied (2xx)
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 9b3f6a2e-0c41-4a8d-9b1e-grobaseoffers01. Collection name: Grobase — Offer capability proof (live stack). Request name: 30 Data CRUD / Create scratch table — POST /query/v1/{dbId}/schema/ddl. Test description: create_table applied (2xx). Error message: expected 500 to be within 200..299. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected 500 to be within 200..299 at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:13).

testcase.name: DDL status=applied
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 9b3f6a2e-0c41-4a8d-9b1e-grobaseoffers01. Collection name: Grobase — Offer capability proof (live stack). Request name: 30 Data CRUD / Create scratch table — POST /query/v1/{dbId}/schema/ddl. Test description: DDL status=applied. Error message: expected '{"error":"identity_unavailable","mess…' to include 'applied'. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected '{"error":"identity_unavailable","mess…' to include 'applied' at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:2:13).

testcase.name: insert succeeded (2xx)
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 9b3f6a2e-0c41-4a8d-9b1e-grobaseoffers01. Collection name: Grobase — Offer capability proof (live stack). Request name: 30 Data CRUD / Insert — op=insert. Test description: insert succeeded (2xx). Error message: expected 500 to be within 200..299. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected 500 to be within 200..299 at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:14).

testcase.name: insert reports rowCount 1
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 9b3f6a2e-0c41-4a8d-9b1e-grobaseoffers01. Collection name: Grobase — Offer capability proof (live stack). Request name: 30 Data CRUD / Insert — op=insert. Test description: insert reports rowCount 1. Error message: expected '{"error":"identity_unavailable","mess…' to match /"rowCount"\s*:\s*1/. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected '{"error":"identity_unavailable","mess…' to match /"rowCount"\s*:\s*1/ at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:2:14).

testcase.name: list succeeded (200)

failure.message: status: expected 500 to be one of [ 200, 201 ]

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 9b3f6a2e-0c41-4a8d-9b1e-grobaseoffers01. Collection name: Grobase — Offer capability proof (live stack). Request name: 30 Data CRUD / List — op=list. Test description: list succeeded (200). Error message: status: expected 500 to be one of [ 200, 201 ]. testcase.name: get succeeded (200)

failure.message: status: expected 500 to be one of [ 200, 201 ]

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 9b3f6a2e-0c41-4a8d-9b1e-grobaseoffers01. Collection name: Grobase — Offer capability proof (live stack). testcase.name: get returns the exact row (id=r1, name=alpha)

testcase.name: txn committed (2xx)
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 9b3f6a2e-0c41-4a8d-9b1e-grobaseoffers01. Collection name: Grobase — Offer capability proof (live stack). Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected 500 to be within 200..299 at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:25).

testcase.name: txn response is not an error envelope
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 9b3f6a2e-0c41-4a8d-9b1e-grobaseoffers01. Collection name: Grobase — Offer capability proof (live stack). Request name: 60 Transactions / Atomic multi-insert — POST /query/v1/txn. Test description: txn response is not an error envelope. Error message: expected '{"error":"identity_unavailable","mess…' to not include '"error"'. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected '{"error":"identity_unavailable","mess…' to not include '"error"' at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:2:25).

testcase.name: txn acknowledges a commit / 2 operations
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 9b3f6a2e-0c41-4a8d-9b1e-grobaseoffers01. Collection name: Grobase — Offer capability proof (live stack). Request name: 60 Transactions / Atomic multi-insert — POST /query/v1/txn. Test description: txn acknowledges a commit / 2 operations. Error message: expected '{"error":"identity_unavailable","mess…' to match /commit|atomic|"results"|rowcount|"ok"/. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected '{"error":"identity_unavailable","mess…' to match /commit|atomic|"results"|rowcount|"ok"/ at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:3:25).

testcase.name: aggregate succeeded (200)

failure.message: status: expected 500 to be one of [ 200, 201 ]

testsuite.name: 70 Realtime / Realtime token / publish gate — POST /realtime/v1/publish

testcase.name: public publish is not exposed as an open 200 (4xx, not 5xx)
bucket created (201)

failure.message: expected response to have status code 201 but got 500

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 9b3f6a2e-0c41-4a8d-9b1e-grobaseoffers01. Collection name: Grobase — Offer capability proof (live stack). Request name: 80 Storage / Create bucket — POST /storage/v1/bucket/{name}. Test description: bucket created (201). Error message: expected response to have status code 201 but got 500. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected response to have status code 201 but got 500 at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:29).

testcase.name: response names the bucket + created flag
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 9b3f6a2e-0c41-4a8d-9b1e-grobaseoffers01. Collection name: Grobase — Offer capability proof (live stack). Request name: 80 Storage / Create bucket — POST /storage/v1/bucket/{name}. Test description: response names the bucket + created flag. Error message: expected undefined to deeply equal 'pmb1781731861523'. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected undefined to deeply equal 'pmb1781731861523' at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:2:29).

testcase.name: upload succeeded (200)

failure.message: status: expected 500 to be one of [ 200, 201 ]

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 9b3f6a2e-0c41-4a8d-9b1e-grobaseoffers01. Collection name: Grobase — Offer capability proof (live stack). Request name: 80 Storage / Upload object — PUT /storage/v1/object/{bucket}/{key}. Test description: upload succeeded (200). Error message: status: expected 500 to be one of [ 200, 201 ]. Stacktrace: AssertionError: status: expected 500 to be one of [ 200, 201 ] at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:30).

testcase.name: server reports the owner-prefixed key
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 9b3f6a2e-0c41-4a8d-9b1e-grobaseoffers01. Collection name: Grobase — Offer capability proof (live stack). Request name: 80 Storage / Upload object — PUT /storage/v1/object/{bucket}/{key}. Test description: server reports the owner-prefixed key. Error message: expected undefined to deeply equal 'pmstore1781731861522/pm/note.txt'. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected undefined to deeply equal 'pmstore1781731861522/pm/note.txt' at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:2:30).

testcase.name: server reports a byte size

failure.message: expected undefined to be a number

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 9b3f6a2e-0c41-4a8d-9b1e-grobaseoffers01. Collection name: Grobase — Offer capability proof (live stack). testcase.name: list succeeded (200)

failure.message: status: expected 500 to be one of [ 200, 201 ]

testcase.name: our object appears with the owner prefix stripped
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 9b3f6a2e-0c41-4a8d-9b1e-grobaseoffers01. Collection name: Grobase — Offer capability proof (live stack). Request name: 80 Storage / List bucket — GET /storage/v1/list/{bucket}. Test description: our object appears with the owner prefix stripped. Error message: expected '{"statusCode":500,"error":"Internal S…' to include 'pm/note.txt'. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected '{"statusCode":500,"error":"Internal S…' to include 'pm/note.txt' at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:2:31).

testcase.name: raw owner namespace is NOT leaked in list keys
signed url is a SigV4 presigned URL

testsuite.name: 80 Storage / Anon-only upload is rejected — PUT (no JWT)

testcase.name: anon-only upload is 401 (storage needs a user identity)
handler ran in the Deno worker (ok:true)

testsuite.name: 90 Functions / Anon-only deploy is rejected — POST (no JWT)

testcase.name: self-service works OR is cleanly disabled (200 / 401 / 404 / 501)
200 resolves to THIS tenant (our slug) — no path id, no cross-tenant
usage works OR is cleanly disabled (200 / 401 / 404 / 501)
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 9b3f6a2e-0c41-4a8d-9b1e-grobaseoffers01. Collection name: Grobase — Offer capability proof (live stack). Request name: 95 Self-service / GET /v1/tenants/me/usage (X-API-Key). Test description: usage works OR is cleanly disabled (200 / 401 / 404 / 501). Error message: expected [ 200, 401, 404, 501 ] to include 500. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected [ 200, 401, 404, 501 ] to include 500 at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:39).
